protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: “steps included thermal lysis and binding at 65 °C, washing, and LAMP detection at 65 °C.”

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: “RNA concentration was quantified by RT-qPCR… three conditions… using intensive buffers and heat treatment at 65 °C”

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: “combined RNA extraction and RT-LAMP detection on a single chip… thermal lysis… at 65 °C… [then] a thorough washing step”

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: “three steps: 1) thermal lysis and binding, 2) washing and magnetic bead-based RNA purification, and 3) colorimetric RT-LAMP detection”; also “buffers containing surfactants … and heat treatment”
